# Python3 REPL commands:

c = 15341890103764929939105506004034128738090325640037083301857608662849501626260517
n = 948406957756830799684818171639547165784816468744946013083947881743680617123566349
e = 65537

# From factordb.com
p = 1891771437429478964908181306574287207137
q = 501332739776173570344039681219489434626477

phi = (p-1)*(q-1)
d = pow(e, -1, phi)
m = pow(c, d, n)
h = hex(m)[2:]
if len(h) % 2 != 0:
    h = '0' + h
y = bytes.fromhex(h)
flag = y.decode()[::-1]
print(flag)

# factordb lookup:
# http://factordb.com/index.php?query=948406957756830799684818171639547165784816468744946013083947881743680617123566349
